case_title: AMANDA FLAIM VS. VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,184.31 FILED BY FLAIM, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD - "REFUSED") COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLAIM, AMANDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-18-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
